title: Quantum chemical modeling, molecular docking, and ADMET evaluation of imidazole phenothiazine hybrids.
research_topic: Quantum chemical modeling, molecular docking, and ADMET evaluation of imidazole phenothiazine hybrids.
activity_related_sentences: Also, the N -IPTZ(b) hybrid decreasing order of reactivity has values of 0.17 for an enzyme inhibitor, 0.09 for a GPCR ligand, 0.03 for an ion channel modulator, − 0.15 for a kinase inhibitor, − 0.19 for a protease inhibitor, and − 0.30 for a nuclear receptor ligand.

6 , 12 Similarly, some recently reported phenothiazine and azole derivatives (I-VII) 13 – 17 also display potential cytotoxic activity (Fig.

Imidazole is a form of 1,3-diazole, and its derivatives have already possess many medicinal uses, including painkillers, antifungals 18 , antihypertensives, anti-obesity drugs, antitumor drugs, antivirals, anthelmintics, antitubercular 19 , anti-ulcer, antihistamines, anti-inflammatory 20 , antidepressants, antidiabetics, anticonvulsants, anti-allergens, antirheumatics, anti-asthmatics, alpha-blockers, antiprotozoal agents, anti-ageing products, and anti-coagulants 21 , 22 .
admet_information: In this study, the ADMET properties of the synthesised N -IPTZ(a-c) hybrids were evaluated with the help of preADMET ( https://preadmet2.bmdrc.kr ) and admetSAR (ecust.edu.cn), which gather details about the ADMET properties of chemical scaffolds from recent studies available on different platforms such as BBB penetration (Blood Brain Barrier Penetration), HIA (Human Intestinal Absorption) caco-2 permeability, HOB (Human Oral-bioavailability), carcinogenicity, EI (Eye Irritation), AMES mutagenesis, hepato-toxicity, TPSA, and AOT (Acute Oral Toxicity) 57 , 58 .

This was achieved by assessing the permeability of the BBB, the permeability of Caco-2, the absorption efficiency of drugs by the HIA, the distribution uniformity of plasma proteins, and their solubility in water.

BOILED-Egg and multiple linear regression models forecast the pharmacokinetic parameters such as GIA (GI absorption), BBB permeability (Blood Brain Barrier permeability), P-gp substrate, CYP450 inhibitors such as 1A2, 2C19, 2C9, 2D6, 3A4, and log K sp (skin permeation) 62 .
This study anticipated two significant isoforms of cytochrome P450 enzymes, CYP3A4 and CYP2D6, which play significant roles in the metabolism and excretion.

SwissDock, Vina AutoDock Vina, DOXO Doxorubicin, DACA Dacarbazine, THIO Thioridazine.

N -IPTZ(a-c) hybrids formed hydrogen bonds with ASP831 and vdW interactions with GLY695, SER696, GLY697, ALA698, PHE699, LYS721, GLY772, CYS773, THR766, GLN767, LEU768, MET769, ARG817, ASN818, and THR830, respectively, against EGFR.

Molecular docking analysis showed that N -IPTZ(c) hybrids might be able to potentially bind with the amino acid residues (GLY695, SER696, GLY697, ALA698, PHE699, LYS721, GLY772, CYS773, THR766, GLN767, LEU768, MET769, ARG817, ASN818, and THR830, respectively) in the active pockets of EGFR.

Similarly, N -IPTZ(a-c) hybrids formed hydrogen bonds with GLY416, vdW interactions with HIS415, GLY416, SER417, LEU430, ARG431, ILE432, MET443, ILE448, PHE450, ALA451, SER457, and GLU545, respectively, against PARP-2.
The π-π interaction with LEU694, VAL702, ALA719, and LEU820, respectively, was also found against EGFR, with ALA433, TYR449, and TYR460, respectively, against PARP-2.
mechanism_information: To identify optimal targets and favourable binding scores for assessing the anticancer efficacy of the newly synthesised hybrids, molecular docking and molecular dynamics (MD) simulations were performed against Insulin-like Growth Factors (IGF), Vascular Endothelial Growth Factor Receptors 1 & 2 (VEGFR1, VEGFR2), Epidermal Growth Factor Receptors (EGFR), and Poly (ADP-ribose) Polymerase-2 (PARP-2) 37 – 39 .

IGF (insulin-like growth factors), VEGFR1, VEGFR2 (vascular endothelial growth factor receptors 1 and 2), EGFR (epidermal growth factor receptors), and PARP-2 (poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase-2) are the key anticancer target proteins.

Notably, studies have shown that phenothiazine-based drugs, such as trifluoperazine (TFP) and thioridazine (THD), inhibit the growth of breast cancer cell lines like SUM159, MDA-MB-231, MCF-7, and SKBR-3.
The American Cancer Society (ACS) highlights that numerous FDA-approved EGFR inhibitors, such as afatinib, erlotinib, and osimertinib, are nitrogen-containing heterocyclic compounds (Fig.
Instead, CYP2C9, CYP2D6, and CYP2C19 work as inhibitors, while CYP3A4 does not work as an inhibitor.
